channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Could not locate Public footpath after passing through the farmyard from Shurdington, 12th June
item.description:
Footpath was well signposted from Shurdington but after passing through the farmyard we couldn’t find it and had to walk down the Badgeworth Lane.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Badgeworth Lane, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Filed was impassable, the grass was nearly 4 feet high with no clear way through. Earlier sign in Badgeworth village green had said 2 miles to Bentham….impassable., 12th June
item.description:
Followed the public footpath signs from Badgeworth Village green to Bentham. Came to the highlighted field and had to turn back. There was no path through the field.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandy Pluck Lane, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public footpath was completely overgrown, 12th June
item.description:
The entire field was a wild meadow with grass about a metre tall. Impassable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Badgeworth Lane, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle with no tax, CU59NJO, 12th June
item.description:
Abandoned vehicle with no tax, CU59NJO
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mead Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned untaxed no-MOT car EF59GYJ, 12th June
item.description:
Abandoned for months, plants growing around wheels. No tax or MOT.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mead Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in road near bend causing cars to swerve and is dangerous, 12th June
item.description:
Outside vehicular access to 149 Old Bath Road Been there 3-4 weeks and is very large and deep
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 148, Old Bath Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green light flickers and goes out, 12th June
item.description:
Turning right into Hoo Lane from Gloucester Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester Road, Priors Park, Tewkesbury, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: The picture is of the field prior to arriving at the footpath for an idea of where it is. Overgrown weeds and brambles, 12th June
item.description:
At the footpath on the right between the houses (it comes out on the main road) after you have walked through the field on the left towards the bottom of Mill Lane, (Stoke Orchard). There is something like an electrical substation on the lane by the field you have to cross.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Archers Lane, Stoke Orchard, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long time standing water, 12th June
item.description:
Standing water/puddle which has been this way since at least March/April time. Has no got pond scum on it. Not sure if it’s been a slow leak or there’s another underlying issue? Needs assessing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 99, Saint Georges Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: No rain in 24 hours - water has increased or remained the same

item.title: Damaged bench, 12th June
item.description:
The bench outside moss bridge is wobbling. Very unstable.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 166-168, High Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Branches falling from trees, 12th June
item.description:
The series of rees along Charlton Drive have for a while dropped increasingly large branches during times of high winds. These often fall onto the road or pavement, obstructing it and having to be moved. Also, along the pavement the trees hang very low, sometimes down to head level and requiring pedestrians to duck or skirt around them. All of the trees being pruned and any weakened branches removed would be much appreciated as it is becoming a hazard rather than a nuisance!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Charlton Park Drive, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Tree causing damage/obstruction to pavement or road

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 12th June
item.description:
15DB 28day with road closure CW pothole 500x450x50mm perm repair STATS narrow road unsuitable for large vehicles (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 12th June
item.description:

item.title: Barriers around damaged roundabout at junction of Bath Road, Shurdington Road and Leckhampton Road,, 12th June
item.description:
I think work is yet to be done to restore the roundabout (I have emailed previously about this) but am wondering about timescales for the repairs.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A46, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Dog poo bin at crickley hill needs emptying, 12th June
item.description:
Dog poo bin at crickley hill needs emptying. Full to overflowing with waste on the ground around.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A417, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 12th June
item.description:
Please jet the gullies as per the plan. This may require the small jetter
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green or amber traffic light is not working problem, 12th June
item.description:
Customer reporting driving through this junction and no illumination could be seen. Looking in her mirror it appeared all the units were "off".
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.description:
